Appearances via Zoom Conference
ASTRID CHIM VILLAGRAN, ESQ., TRESSLER LLP (925) 332-0441 avillagran@tresslerllp.com
Attorney for Defendants, 816 GEARY I5 LP; RENTSFNOW, INC.; GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGENENT, INC.; and VERITAS INVESTMENTS INC.

Matter is discussed, not ARGUED. Matter is not contested. Cousenl for defendants appeared to make a record re: correction to the case numbres reflecting the correct case title in the Court's tentative ruling. Court takes note of this correction and adopt the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT 816 GEARY I5, LP, RENTSFNOW, INC., GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-25-623245 WITH CASE CGC-25-622219

The unopposed motion to consolidate Service American Indemnity Company v. Bleyle Elevator, Inc., et al., CGC-25-623245, with Grigsby et al. v. 816 Geary I5 et al., CGC-25-622219, for all purposes is granted. Ashante Grisby, CGC-25-622219, shall be the lead case.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
